zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon IV de Montfort於1151年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利時，他的父親Simon de Montfort III30歲，母親Mathilde De Beaumont-Le Roger d'Evreaux31歲。他於1165年與Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1188年7月18日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯洛福吉-易維林斯享年37歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯沙吉雷米-利諾雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon IV de Montfort于1151年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利时，他的父亲Simon de Montfort III30岁，母亲Mathilde De Beaumont-Le Roger d'Evreaux31岁。他于1165年与Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1188年7月18日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯洛福吉-易維林斯享年37岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯沙吉雷米-利諾雷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon IV de Montfort was born in 1151, in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, his father, Simon de Montfort III, was 30 and his mother, Mathilde De Beaumont-Le Roger d'Evreaux, was 31. He married Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester in 1165. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 18 July 1188, in Rochefort-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 37, and was buried in Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon IV de Montfort est né en 1151, à Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, son père, Simon de Montfort III, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mathilde De Beaumont-Le Roger d'Evreaux, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester en 1165. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 juillet 1188, à Rochefort-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon IV de Montfort 1151 in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon de Montfort III 30 und seine Mutter Mathilde De Beaumont-Le Roger d'Evreaux 31. Er hat 1165 Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 18. Juli 1188 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Rochefort-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon IV de Montfort è nato il nel 1151 nel Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Simon de Montfort III, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde De Beaumont-Le Roger d'Evreaux, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester nel 1165. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 luglio 1188, nel Rochefort-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon IV de Montfortが1151年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスモントフォート-ル'アマアウリーで生まれた時，父Simon de Montfort IIIは30歳，母Mathilde De Beaumont-Le Roger d'Evreauxは31歳であった。1165年にAmice De Beaumont Of Leicesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1188年7月18日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスロチェフォート-エン-イベラインスで37歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスサイント-ルeムイ-ル'hオノーeにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon IV de Montfort(이)가 1151년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 몽포트-'아모리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon de Montfort III(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde De Beaumont-Le Roger d'Evreaux(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1165년 Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1188년 7월 18일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 록헤포트--이벨라이네스에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 세인트-e미-'호노e에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon IV de Montfort nasceu em 1151, em Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Simon de Montfort III, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde De Beaumont-Le Roger d'Evreaux, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester em 1165. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 18 de julho de 1188, em Rochefort-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon IV de Montfort родился в 1151 г. в местности монтфорт-л'амаури, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Simon de Montfort III было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde De Beaumont-Le Roger d'Evreaux, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester в 1165 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 18 июля 1188 г. в местности рошефорт-ен-ивелаинесь, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-рeми-л'хонорe, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon IV de Montfort nació en 1151, en Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Simon de Montfort III, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mathilde De Beaumont-Le Roger d'Evreaux, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Amice De Beaumont Of Leicester en 1165. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de julio de 1188, en Rochefort-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Rémy-l'Honoré, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia.
